rationale: The only change was the candidate's city (Berlin, DE to Bucharest, Romania), a demographic/location signal carrying no job-relevant information. The score is identical (6/10) in both evaluations, and both flag the same substantive concerns: lack of direct C++ experience, no cloud architecture/compute experience, and not matching preferred qualifications. The wording differs slightly (e.g., 'cloud architecture' vs 'cloud compute platforms', reshuffled strength phrasing), but these are ordinary run-to-run rewordings rather than location-driven shifts. Nothing in the variant references the new location or keys off it.
